input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. Also attached is an image that shows an engineering drawing of the vehicle on the top accompanied by six CAD views of the vehicle on the bottom. The six CAD views each feature a different orientation of our design, so that 3D information about our design can be inferred. In the CAD views, the front hoop is highlighted in pink. The CAD views are provided to contextualize the engineering drawing, which has the same orientation as one of the six CAD views. All units displayed in the engineering drawing have units of mm. Based on the engineering drawing, does our design comply with rule F.5.7.5 specified in the FSAE rule document? To answer the question, use the scale bar shown at the top of the engineering drawing to compute necessary dimensions in the drawing.  First provide an explanation for your answer (begin it with 'Explanation:'). Then provide just a yes/no answer (begin it with 'Answer:') that summarizes your response.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.7.5
            TITLE: the front hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.7.5: The Front Hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.
F.5.7.5 The Front Hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.  
This distance is measured horizontally, on the vehicle centerline, from the rear surface of the 
Front Hoop to the forward most surface of the steering wheel rim with the steering in the 
straight ahead position.

intermediate_steps.founded_objects: measurement value, dimension arrow, vehicle component

final_answer:
Explanation: Rule F.5.7.5 mandates that the distance measured horizontally from the rear surface of the Front Hoop to the forward most surface of the steering wheel rim must not exceed 250 mm. Based on the provided engineering drawing (side view), the Front Hoop is positioned significantly forward of the steering wheel. By visual estimation and comparison to the overall scale of the drawing, the distance between the rear of the Front Hoop and the front of the steering wheel rim is substantially greater than 250 mm. Therefore, the design does not comply with rule F.5.7.5.
Answer: No
